Axios AI buyers want rollback plans before model rollouts

Axios reports that enterprise AI buyers increasingly ask vendors to prove rollback paths before large model rollouts.

Teams want evidence that deployment workflows can survive outages, policy changes, and retrieval regressions without forcing a full product freeze.

Sign up for Axios AI+

By signing up, you agree to receive newsletters and promotional content.

That pushes infrastructure teams to show audit logs, feature flags, circuit breakers, and clear human escalation paths earlier in procurement cycles.
